data.title: Maris-Tech Secures Pilot Order for  Drones OEM Module from U.S.-Based Customer
data.description: The initial deployment of pilots for utilizing loitering munitions has significantly boosted the adoption of the platform and contributed to the growth propelled by resellers. This crucial step has accelerated the expansion as the platform is being increasingly embraced, with a notable increase in sales attributed to the reseller network. This strategic move has notably increased sales figures with a surge in adoption, marking a pivotal moment in driving growth and market presence.

data.title: TekSynap Achieves Select-Level Partner Status in ServiceNow Build Program
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, TekSynap Corporation, a prominent provider of advanced IT solutions for federal clients, revealed their accomplishment of reaching Select-level partner status in the ServiceNow Build Program. This development acknowledges their substantial technical proficiency and increasing influence in ServiceNow implementations. Attaining Select-level status highlights TekSynap's proven capacity to provide top-notch ServiceNow solutions that result in tangible benefits.

data.title: Wearable Devices Receives U.S. Patent Notice of Allowance for Biometric User Authentication in Gesture and Voice-Controlled Interface Device
data.description: A recently issued continuation patent safeguards the process of verifying users based on distinctive biological signals, ensuring secure transactions, user identification, and authorized activities. This patent enables authentication using individuals' unique biological traits, enhancing security measures and facilitating protected interactions.

data.title: Paulius Butkus elected Chair of the Board of Energy Cells
data.description: A recently established energy organization, EPSO-G, features a legal entity code of 302826889 and is headquartered at Laisvės pr. 10 in Vilnius, Lithuania.

data.title: A New Era in Customer Comfort and Network Growth Begins as Air Canada Receives its First Airbus A321XLR
data.description: Air Canada received its first Airbus A321XLR in Hamburg, a modern aircraft tailored for longer routes with enhanced passenger comfort. The plane, obtained through a lease from SMBC Aviation Capital, signifies a significant step in Air Canada's plan to revamp and expand its fleet. In total, the airline is set to incorporate 30 A321XLR aircraft into its operations, with 15 being leased and 15 purchased directly from Airbus S.A.S. This move highlights Air Canada's commitment to modernizing its fleet and adapting to evolving aviation demands.

data.title: Tequila Centinela Expands Distribution in Partnership with Republic National Distributing Company in Florida and Texas
data.description: Centinela, a renowned family-owned brand of high-quality tequilas, is expanding its presence in the United States by targeting two major consumer markets. On April 24, 2026, in Miami, it was disclosed that Tequila Centinela has secured a pivotal distribution deal with Republic National Distributing Company (RNDC), a prominent national distributor. This strategic partnership aims to amplify Centinela's reach across key regions in the U.S. and capitalize on the growing demand for premium tequilas. This move highlights the brand's commitment to enhancing accessibility and availability, with the goal of tapping into a substantial market share in the lucrative spirits industry.

data.title: JTV® and Make-A-Wish® Launch National Fundraising Campaign Supporting Children with Critical Illnesses
data.description: A leading jewelry retailer, JTV®, has unveiled a new initiative named "Give More Save More," aimed at supporting Make-A-Wish®. The company, based in Knoxville, Tenn., is set to implement this program starting on April 24, 2026. Through this partnership, JTV® seeks to contribute to the mission of Make-A-Wish® on a national scale, extending their reach beyond their broadcast network. This exciting collaboration will make a significant impact on the well-being of children with critical illnesses.

data.title: WEPACK 2026 Concludes on a Record High, Reinforcing China's Role at the Heart of the Global Packaging Industry
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, the WEPACK 2026 World Expo of Packaging Industry recently wrapped up after a successful three-day run at the Shenzhen World Exhibition & Convention Center (Bao'an). This edition stood out for its unprecedented attendance numbers and impressive business achievements.

data.title: The Cigna Group, Leading Health Plans Advance Work to Simplify Prior Authorization
data.description: BLOOMFIELD, Connecticut - On April 24, 2026, the Cigna Group, a renowned health company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CI, announced its collaboration with top health plans to establish uniform electronic submission criteria for prior authorizations of frequently examined medical procedures. This initiative aims to expedite the process and enhance efficiency within the healthcare system.

data.title: Iridius Raises $8.6M Seed Round to Build Compliance-by-Design AI Platform for Regulated Enterprise Workflows
data.description: Iridius, based in Seattle, is developing a compliance-oriented execution layer tailored for life sciences companies to support the implementation of AI at scale and maximize its benefits. The platform is designed with built-in confidence mechanisms to ensure regulatory adherence and enhance value creation for enterprises in this sector.

data.title: Enterprises Transform Procurement Operations with AI
data.description: Business research firm ISG reports that enterprises are increasingly transitioning procurement operations to AI-enabled and data-driven processes in Stamford, Connecticut. This shift is aimed at enhancing scalability and governance to achieve improved outcomes. With this trend, companies are integrating advanced technologies to streamline their procurement activities.

data.title: Trio-Tech International (TRT) Announces Pricing of $10 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Van Nuys, California, Trio-Tech International ("Trio-Tech" or "the Company") disclosed the agreement of securities purchase with institutional investors to acquire 1,052,632 shares of its common stock. Trio-Tech, listed on NYSE MKT as TRT, is renowned for providing semiconductor back-end solutions and as a global supplier of electronic equipment. The registered direct offering, involving the aforementioned number of shares, is anticipated to close soon.
